activities.title: Warm-up confirmation items
activities.expected_evidence: Correct identification of two equivalent fraction pairs
activities.rationale: Confirm prerequisite readiness before repair work.

activities.title: Guided equivalent-fraction repair
activities.expected_evidence: Worked example plus guided problem completed with correct scaling
activities.rationale: Addresses the top teaching priority for the class.

activities.title: Independent unlike-fraction addition
activities.expected_evidence: Two independent problems with correct common denominators
activities.rationale: Reconnect repaired prerequisites to the lesson target skill.

activities.title: Near-transfer exit ticket
activities.expected_evidence: One near-transfer item distinguishing immediate success from transfer
activities.rationale: Capture transfer outcome evidence for the intervention report.
